name: Brightwheel Childcare Management API
what_it_does: Brightwheel REST API for childcare center and preschool management platform. Enables AI agents to manage child enrollment and profiles, track attendance and check-in/check-out, handle billing and tuition payments, communicate with parents through activity updates, manage staff schedules and ratios, access licensing and compliance data, and integrate childcare operations with external systems.
use_cases: Managing child enrollment and profile data from childcare operations agents
Tracking attendance and check-in/check-out from security and compliance agents
Processing tuition billing and payment collection from billing automation agents
Sending parent activity updates and daily reports from family communication agents
not_for: K-12 schools without early childhood education focus
After-school programs without full childcare center management needs
Healthcare childcare without medical-grade clinical requirements
best_when: A childcare center, daycare, or preschool using Brightwheel wants AI agents to automate enrollment management, attendance tracking, parent communication, and billing workflows.
avoid_when: COPPA+PRIVACY: Children's data is subject to COPPA protections. Child check-in/check-out data and images are highly sensitive. All integrations must comply with COPPA and applicable state childcare regulations.

auth.notes: Brightwheel uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Program-level credentials per childcare center. Partner program for third-party integrations. Scopes control access to children, families, attendance, and billing data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan for small programs; API on paid plans
pricing.paid_tiers: Essential, Plus, and Premium tiers based on enrollment; API on Plus and above
pricing.notes: San Francisco company, founded 2014. Largest childcare management platform in the US — 150,000+ programs. Strong parent communication and licensing compliance features.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: COPPA: Children's data requires strict COPPA compliance — never expose to unauthorized parties
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 partner program
Child check-in/check-out and photo data is highly sensitive — implement strict access controls
US data residency only — verify for international childcare operators
API access restricted to Plus and Premium plans
State childcare licensing data varies by state — understand regulatory context
agent_readiness.security_notes: COPPA: Children's personal data including photos and attendance. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2 with program-level scoping. US data residency only. Strict COPPA compliance required.

security_score_components.security_notes: Children's personal data subject to COPPA. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US data residency only. Highest privacy sensitivity.
